acceptance_criteria.text: ForgeWire/Fabric can load the ForgeLink MCP bridge from a documented config and list its tools, resources, and prompts as advertised capabilities.
A live or high-fidelity local smoke proves a Fabric or ForgeWire agent can call request_human_approval and produce a ForgeLink Agents UI message.
The human action path is validated end-to-end: ForgeLink records the selected action and the originating ForgeWire/Fabric side can observe the outcome.
Capability manifest output is captured as evidence, including the ForgeLink tools/prompts/resources visible to Fabric routing.
Any Fabric install or runtime mismatch is documented as either fixed in this item or split into a follow-up work item with explicit owner and risk.
